description.ko: 유기적 생물학과 첨단 기술의 합성을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 식물 생명체가 실리콘과 빛을 통해 진화하는 표본을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the synthesis between organic biology and advanced technology, depicting a specimen where botanical life evolves through silicon and light.

prompt: Hyper-realistic close-up of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower with translucent glass-like petals and glowing fiber-optic veins. The center of the flower pulses with a soft blue LED light, surrounded by intricate copper circuit patterns. It is growing from a bed of moss integrated with microchips. The background is a dreamy, bokeh-filled digital forest with floating data particles and neon-lit vines. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetic, high contrast.
